name: Fenwaick Credit Repair
description_short: Michael T Fenwick offers credit repair disputes, credit coaching, and business credit services. Services include unlimited dispute rounds, credit audits, and one-on-one mentorship.
description_long:
Michael T Fenwick is a credit repair and business coaching service founded by Michael T. Fenwick, who transitioned from working as a U.S. postal worker to helping clients rebuild credit and launch businesses. According to the website, Fenwick personally experienced financial hardship and credit challenges before studying credit systems and funding strategies to rebuild his own life, which became the foundation for his coaching practice. The company offers three core service categories: personal credit repair (dispute services for inaccurate or outdated items), personal credit coaching (one-on-one audits and rebuilding strategies), and business credit coaching (separating personal and business credit, accessing funding). Additionally, they provide mindset and entrepreneurship coaching. What distinguishes Fenwick's approach is the combination of credit repair with business funding strategy and personal development coaching in a single-provider model, marketed as 1-on-1 personalized support rather than pre-recorded courses. The company claims clients have improved scores from the 500s to 700+ range and obtained business lines of credit and approval for credit products. However, the website provides limited information about dispute methodology, specific success rates, regulatory compliance details, or credentials certifying the credit repair work itself.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers multiple dispute rounds (3-8 rounds depending on package) specifically targeting collections, charge-offs, judgments, bankruptcy, foreclosures, and inquiries
Combines credit repair with business credit coaching and mindset training in one service, addressing multiple barriers simultaneously
Provides one-on-one personalized coaching rather than automated or pre-recorded systems
Includes credit audits and customized 30-90 day action plans tailored to individual situations
Offers a free discovery call to assess fit before commitment
Platinum package includes monthly payment option ($279 down + $110/month) rather than requiring full upfront payment
Business Builder package includes custom business setup and funding strategy for clients starting from scratch
cons: Website does not disclose formal credentials, certifications, or regulatory licenses for credit repair services (ROSCA compliance, FCRA expertise not mentioned)
No information about dispute success rates, average credit score improvements, or timeline specifics beyond general '30-90 days' estimate
Pricing is relatively high compared to standalone credit repair services (Platinum at $279+$110/month; Gold at $1,300 one-time), and unclear if clients pay separately for coaching services
Testimonials lack verifiable details (no last names, no before/after documentation shown) and could not be independently verified
Website does not address potential FTC regulations on credit repair claims or explain the limits of what disputes can accomplish
best_for: Individuals with multiple negative items (collections, charge-offs, judgments) who also want to launch a business and need credit repair plus funding strategy
Entrepreneurs or business owners with poor personal credit seeking to build separate business credit and access funding
Clients who prefer one-on-one coaching and accountability over DIY credit repair or automated dispute services
People looking for combined mindset/entrepreneurship support alongside credit repair work
diagnosis: Fenwick Credit Repair is best for individuals with damaged credit seeking disputes AND business building support, particularly entrepreneurs willing to invest in one-on-one coaching. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent credentials, independently verifiable results, and detailed dispute methodology, making it important for consumers to verify regulatory compliance and request specific documentation of track record before enrolling.
services: Personal credit disputes (unlimited rounds in premium packages targeting inaccurate or outdated items)
Inquiry reduction (15+ inquiries targeted in packages)
Personal credit audits and score analysis
One-on-one credit coaching and repair strategy development
Business credit coaching and separation from personal credit
Mentorship and ongoing support (in higher-tier packages)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Michael T Fenwick offers credit repair disputes, credit coaching, audits, and business credit services with unlimited dispute rounds.
